content.text:
<timestamp>Tuesday, Jul 7, 2026, 10:53 AM (UTC+7)</timestamp>
<user_query>
Complete PayTor Hammer V3 setup on 26.161.75.32 (DESKTOP-KD2V4NM). WinRM: usr1cv8/usr1cv8.

## Ticket scope (ФМ00-003122 / ФМ00-003198)
1. Connect KKT Viki Print to Saby Retail
2. Configure scanner Mertech Mercury CL-2200 P2D
3. Set up ТС ПИОТ (ESM) module on terminal
4. Product accounting integration = client does themselves (Saby Retail already installed)

## Known state from prior scan
- Saby Retail: C:\ProgramData\Saby Retail\14ec004d9caa4432e5140c8d3c5d7e35, retail.saby.ru
- VikiDriver 2.0.2: C:\Program Files\VikiDriver, COM8, plant 0493037753, ports 5919/8088/50003, VikiService running
- ESM: esm-orchestrator (51077), esm-lm-controller (5995), regime running - NO esm-cm-* control module
- Scanner: Mertech Mercury CL-2200 P2D USB VID 11734 PID 10849, ScannerKeyboard driver, IsActive false in Saby cache
- Saby logs: repeated KKT connection errors, tspiot_dkktup_ow=false
- Tensor/Saby in C:\Program Files\Tensor

## Your tasks - do ALL you can remotely
1. Deep inventory: all ESM/Viki/Saby/Regime installs, services, configs, logs
2. Find and install/start ESM Control Module (esm-cm) for Viki Print - check if installer exists on disk, VikiEsm, Dreamkas DKKT via ESM
3. Fix dkktList on 51077 - KKT must appear for ТС ПИОТ
4. Read VikiDriver REST API on 5919/8088/50003 - test KKT communication on COM8
5. Read Saby device config - find how KKT and scanner are configured, fix if possible via config files
6. Configure ТС ПИОТ: regime + ESM orchestrator, port 51401 if needed, link to Saby
7. Activate scanner in Saby config if file-based possible
8. Check for VikiEsm service, Dreamkas ESM driver "[Dreamkas] Driver DKKT via work with ESM"
9. Document what requires GUI on terminal vs what was fixed

## Reference from similar machines
- On 26.67.73.24: VikiDriver + VikiEsm + ESM orchestrator pattern
- esm-cm-{KKT_SN} service needed for dkktList
- regime service = marking module

## Rules
- Work via WinRM Invoke-Command
- Be honest about what works vs needs on-site GUI
- Return structured report: done/pending/blocked for each of 3 ticket items
</user_query>
